case_title: John Stewart Company vs. Willie Lee Cobb Jr. a.k.a Willie Cobb and Does 1 to 5

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COBB JR., WILLIE LEE A.K.A. WILLIE COBB THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 373 ELLIS STREET, UNIT #103, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT COBB JR., WILLIE LEE A.K.A. WILLIE COBB

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT COBB JR., WILLIE LEE A.K.A. WILLIE COBB
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
